_comment: Frozen regression baseline for the murmur detector. v2 is a clean, public-data-only 3-seed bagged ensemble of the 5s log-mel CNN+BiGRU BCE/F1 recipe (seeds 0/1/2 = runs/murmur_cv_logmel_5s_bce_select_f1_v1 + _seed1 + _seed2), averaged out-of-fold via openstetho_model.ensemble_oof. It is gate-IMPROVED over the v1 single-model baseline AND over the teacher-distilled w=0.20 research lead, with no teacher signal. Deployment note: the ensemble is a research/benchmark baseline; shipping it as a single Core ML artifact needs either multi-model export or distillation into one student (future work). The released app checkpoint is governed separately (see docs/murmur_detector_benchmark.md). Teacher-distilled candidates must NOT be frozen here. To promote: run regression_gate, confirm IMPROVED, replace the scorecard block, bump baseline_version.
